_comment: GitHub Secrets Configuration Template for OnePageAuthor API Platform
_usage: Copy this file to secrets.json, fill in values, then run: npm run init-secrets -- -ConfigFile secrets.json
_security: NEVER commit secrets.json to source control! Add it to .gitignore

Core Infrastructure (Required for Deploy._description: Required Azure authentication and resource configuration

Core Function App (function-app) Deploym._description: Required only if you want the GitHub Action to deploy the standalone function-app project

Deployment Flags (Optional)._description: Feature flags used by the GitHub Actions workflow to turn deployments on/off

Cosmos DB Provisioning (Optional)._description: Used only if you want the workflow to deploy Cosmos DB and/or Application Insights via Bicep

Application Insights Resource (Optional)._description: Used only if you want the workflow to deploy Application Insights via Bicep

Application Insights / Azure Monitor Tel._description: Single source of truth: connection string used by all apps (Functions + WHMCS Worker) for Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry export to the Application Insights backend

Azure Storage (Required for ImageAPI)._description: Required for image upload and storage

Azure Communication Services Email (Opti._description: Optional for sending email via Azure Communication Services

_whmcs_worker_systemd._description: WHMCS Worker Service systemd watchdog defaults. These do NOT override systemd's own NOTIFY_SOCKET/WATCHDOG_* vars; the worker uses them only if systemd vars are missing/blank.
_whmcs_worker_systemd._notes: Defaults are safe for Ubuntu systemd. Leave as-is unless you have a custom notify socket path or want a different ping cadence.

WHMCS Worker Deployment (Optional)._description: Optional for deploying the WHMCS worker VM and its Service Bus dependencies

Amazon Product API (Optional)._description: Optional for Amazon Product Advertising API integration
